zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Alford於1509年出生在英國薩默塞特特斯陶頓時，他的父親John Alford34歲，母親Agnes Hannah24歲。他於大約1538年與Agnes Clarke在英國薩默塞特特斯陶頓結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1575年12月22日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特特斯陶頓享年66歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特特斯陶頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander Alford于1509年出生在英国薩默塞特特斯陶頓时，他的父亲John Alford34岁，母亲Agnes Hannah24岁。他于大约1538年与Agnes Clarke在英国薩默塞特特斯陶頓结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1575年12月22日在英国英格兰薩默塞特特斯陶頓享年66岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特特斯陶頓。

nameMeanings.name: Alford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of various places called Alford, for example in Somerset, Cheshire and Lincolnshire. The first is named with the Old English female personal name Ealdgȳth + ford ‘ford’. See also Alvord .

variants.name: Alvord
meanings: English (southwestern): variant of   Alford   1; the spelling reflects the southwestern English dialect pronunciation.
History: This surname was brought to North America by Alexander Alvord, who came from Devon or Somerset to Windsor, CT, c. 1645. He had many prominent descendants.

variants.name: Halford
meanings: English (mainly Midlands): habitational name from any of various places called Halford. Most, for example those in Warwickshire, Devon, and Shropshire, or the lost place Haleford in Pembury (Kent), are named from Old English halh ‘nook, recess’ + ford ‘ford’.
English: variant of Alford with prosthetic H-.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Alford was born in 1509, in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England, his father, John Alford, was 34 and his mother, Agnes Hannah, was 24. He married Agnes Clarke about 1538, in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 22 December 1575, in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Alford est né en 1509, à Whitestaunton, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, John Alford, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Agnes Hannah, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Clarke environ 1538, à Whitestaunton, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 22 décembre 1575, à Whitestaunton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Whitestaunton, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Alford 1509 in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Alford 34 und seine Mutter Agnes Hannah 24. Er hat um 1538 in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England Agnes Clarke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 22. Dezember 1575 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Alford è nato il nel 1509 nel Whitestaunton, Somerset, England, il suo padre, John Alford, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Hannah, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Clarke circa 1538, nel Whitestaunton, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 22 dicembre 1575, nel Whitestaunton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Whitestaunton, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Alfordが1509年にイギリスソメルセトウィテスタウントンで生まれた時，父John Alfordは34歳，母Agnes Hannahは24歳であった。約1538年にイギリスソメルセトウィテスタウントンでAgnes Clarkeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1575年12月22日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトウィテスタウントンで66歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトウィテスタウントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Alford(이)가 1509년 영국 서머세트 휘츠타운턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Alford(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Hannah(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1538년 영국 서머세트 휘츠타운턴에서 Agnes Clarke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1575년 12월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 휘츠타운턴에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 휘츠타운턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Alford nasceu em 1509, em Whitestaunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Alford, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Hannah, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Clarke aproximadamente 1538, em Whitestaunton, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de dezembro de 1575, em Whitestaunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Whitestaunton, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Alford родился в 1509 г. в местности уитстаунтон, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени John Alford было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Hannah, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Clarke около 1538 г. в местности уитстаунтон, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 22 декабря 1575 г. в местности уитстаунтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности уитстаунтон, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander Alford nació en 1509, en Whitestaunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, John Alford, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Agnes Hannah, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Agnes Clarke aproximadamente 1538, en Whitestaunton, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 22 de diciembre de 1575, en Whitestaunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Whitestaunton, Somerset, Inglaterra.
